mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lab_repair ( repair_id, device_id, applicant_id, description, status, comment, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{repairId}, #{deviceId}, #{applicantId}, #{description}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{comment}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE device_id = VALUES(device_id), applicant_id = VALUES(applicant_id), description = VALUES(description), status = VALUES(status), comment = VALUES(comment), created_at = VALUES(created_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lab_repair WHERE repair_id = #{repairId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM lab_repair ORDER BY repair_id
